translation.literal_translation: At the point of departure (from the body), due to becoming thus, says Audulomi. (21)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.21: Audulomi grounds identity language in transformative becoming culminating at transcendence from embodied limitation.
translation.interpretive_note: School-position sutra encoding the processual identity thesis.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Literal keeps technical compactness with implied context.
Technical line chooses a process reading of evambhava, standard but curation-dependent.
